outcome.transcript:
[   1.0s] Customer: Hello.
[   5.0s] Kate: Hi, this is Kate calling about your 2025 Jeep Grand Cherokee. Our system has detected that it needs service for maintenance. I'd love to help you get that scheduled at Village Jeep. Does that work for you?
[  16.0s] Customer: Sure.
[  18.0s] Kate: Wonderful! I have a few times available for you. How about Tuesday, May twelfth, at eight thirty in the morning, or Tuesday, May twelfth, at one thirty in the afternoon? We also have Wednesday, May thirteenth, at nine in the morning. Which of...
[  29.0s] Customer: What?
[  31.0s] Kate: Apologies, I...
[  32.0s] Customer: One sec. One sec.
[  41.0s] Kate: Of course, take your time. I'm here when you're ready.
[  45.0s] Customer: One sec.
[  48.0s] Kate: No problem at all. I'll be right here.
[  54.0s] Customer: Repeat them, please.
[  59.0s] Kate: Certainly! The available times are:

Tuesday, May twelfth, at eight thirty in the morning.
Tuesday, May twelfth, at one thirty in the afternoon.
Wednesday, May thirteenth, at nine in the morning.

Which of those works best for you?
[  72.0s] Customer: One sec
[  81.0s] Kate: No problem at all. I'll wait.
